slack.instructions: On each run: 1) Read the timestamps above and only pull messages NEWER than those timestamps. 2) If a timestamp is empty, pull the last 50 messages. 3) Check all signals_raised_last_run — if any appear again, flag as RISING and increment recurrence. 4) Update timestamps and signals after each run.

hubspot.cross_reference_key: unique_identifier field on DEAL object = restID (UUID format)
hubspot.instructions: On each run: 1) Skip any ticket_id already in seen_ticket_ids. 2) Pull new tickets from Support Pipeline and URGENT AM Follow-Up pipelines only. 3) Cross-reference venue names against venues_flagged list — if match, escalate heat score. 4) Use unique_identifier on DEAL object to link to restID. 5) Update seen_ticket_ids and signals after each run.

mixpanel.instructions: On each run: 1) Query baseline_events and compare to previous week counts. 2) Flag any venue named in other agent signals that shows zero Partner Portal logins — this is HIGH priority. 3) Flag any NCI activation as a POSITIVE OKR2 signal. 4) Update all counts and trends after each run. 5) Never surface venues not already flagged by Slack, Granola, or HubSpot collectors.
